verses.text: Jeremiah brings the Rechabites into the temple and sets wine before them as a test. A living lesson begins. God uses one family's faithfulness to rebuke a faithless nation.
Jeremiah brings the Rechabites into the temple and sets wine before them as a test. A living lesson begins. God uses one family's faithfulness to rebuke a faithless nation.
Jeremiah brings the Rechabites into the temple and sets wine before them as a test. A living lesson begins. God uses one family's faithfulness to rebuke a faithless nation.
Jeremiah brings the Rechabites into the temple and sets wine before them as a test. A living lesson begins. God uses one family's faithfulness to rebuke a faithless nation.
Jeremiah brings the Rechabites into the temple and sets wine before them as a test. A living lesson begins. God uses one family's faithfulness to rebuke a faithless nation.
They refuse, for their father Jonadab commanded them to drink no wine, build no house, and sow no seed. They keep his rule. Their loyalty to a human father's word is striking.
They refuse, for their father Jonadab commanded them to drink no wine, build no house, and sow no seed. They keep his rule. Their loyalty to a human father's word is striking.
They have obeyed all he commanded, dwelling in tents, only entering the city for fear of the army. Their obedience is whole. A simple, consistent faithfulness marks their lives.
They have obeyed all he commanded, dwelling in tents, only entering the city for fear of the army. Their obedience is whole. A simple, consistent faithfulness marks their lives.
They have obeyed all he commanded, dwelling in tents, only entering the city for fear of the army. Their obedience is whole. A simple, consistent faithfulness marks their lives.
They have obeyed all he commanded, dwelling in tents, only entering the city for fear of the army. Their obedience is whole. A simple, consistent faithfulness marks their lives.

The Rechabites obeyed their father's word for generations, 'but this people hath not hearkened unto me.' The contrast condemns Judah. If men keep a man's command, how much more should they keep God's.

The Rechabites obeyed their father's word for generations, 'but this people hath not hearkened unto me.' The contrast condemns Judah. If men keep a man's command, how much more should they keep God's.

The Rechabites obeyed their father's word for generations, 'but this people hath not hearkened unto me.' The contrast condemns Judah. If men keep a man's command, how much more should they keep God's.

The Rechabites obeyed their father's word for generations, 'but this people hath not hearkened unto me.' The contrast condemns Judah. If men keep a man's command, how much more should they keep God's.
So God will bring on Judah all the threatened evil, but 'Jonadab... shall not want a man to stand before me for ever.' Faithfulness is rewarded. God honours obedience down the generations.
